About the job

Company Description
 

6 Twenty One Capital LLC is a financial services company headquartered in Concord, North Carolina. With a commitment to providing tailored financial solutions, the company operates with a focus on innovation and excellence. Situated at 5714 Woodridge CT, 6 Twenty One Capital LLC supports diverse financial needs with a strong emphasis on client satisfaction. The organization is dedicated to delivering reliable and impactful financial services to businesses and individuals.


 Role Description
 

This is a full-time remote role for a Financial Analyst - Treasury. The role involves managing treasury operations, analyzing financial data, and ensuring effective cash flow forecasting and management. Responsibilities include monitoring financial systems, preparing reports, and supporting decision-making processes by providing key financial insights. The analyst will play a vital role in maintaining financial stability and optimizing the organization's treasury functions.


 Qualifications
 
Strong expertise in Treasury Management and Cash Management practices
Proficient in Analytical Skills and Cash Flow Forecasting
Solid understanding of Finance principles and practices
Excellent problem-solving and decision-making abilities
Strong attention to detail and ability to work independently in a remote environment
Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field; advanced degrees or certifications (e.g., CFA, CPA) are a plus
Experience using financial modeling and treasury software tools

ai_eval.job_summary: This role is a full-time remote Financial Analyst position focused on treasury operations, cash flow forecasting, and financial data analysis to support decision-making and maintain financial stability.
top_reasons: Role aligns with candidate's target roles in financial analysis and analyst positions
No cold calling or commission-heavy sales involved, matching candidate's preferences
Full-time remote work fits candidate's employment type and workplace flexibility preferences
Salary of $65K is reasonable for entry-level financial analyst roles
Role offers upward mobility in finance with transferable analytical skills
resume_angles: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science with analytical and technical skills
Experience with data analysis, automation, and software projects demonstrating problem-solving
Leadership and project coordination experience from philanthropy chair role
Strong skills in Python, SQL, and data workflows applicable to financial data analysis
Experience tracking and reporting performance metrics in sales role
Interest in moving away from sales to analytical roles
missing_gaps: No direct finance, accounting, or treasury experience
Lacks formal finance certifications or degrees (e.g., CFA, CPA)
Limited explicit experience with financial modeling or treasury software tools

About the job

Client Experience Associate




Three Sixty Wealth Management | Registered Investment Advisory




Three Sixty Wealth Management is a growing, relationship-driven RIA serving high-net-worth and ultra-high-net-worth families with comprehensive planning, investment management, and multi-generational wealth strategies. We are seeking a Client Experience Associate to become the operational backbone of our firm and the first impression our clients feel every time they interact with us.




This is not a receptionist role. This is not a back-office paperwork role.




This is the hub of client service, operations, CRM integrity, and advisor support that allows our advisors to focus on planning, strategy, and relationships while you ensure everything else runs flawlessly.




If you love process, precision, and creating an exceptional client experience, this role is for you.




What You’ll Do




Client Service & Account Processing

Serve as the primary point of contact for all non-advisory client needs
Process account openings, transfers, beneficiary updates, distributions, and custodial paperwork
Track all service requests from start to finish and ensure timely completion
Monitor pending business and proactively follow up with custodians and clients

Operations & Workflow Management

Own the firm’s operational workflows from onboarding through ongoing service
Prepare and upload client reports to secure vaults
Support month-end, quarter-end, and year-end operational tasks
Prepare documents and follow-up items after client meetings
Ensure nothing falls through the cracks

CRM & Data Integrity

Maintain complete accuracy of client records in CRM
Manage task workflows, reporting, segmentation, and contact management
Produce weekly reports on pending transfers, service issues, and new business
Keep CRM audit-ready at all times

Advisor Support (Non-Advisory)

Handle all administrative follow-up after client meetings
Coordinate document requests and vault organization
Remove operational burden from advisors so they can focus on clients

Client Experience & Office Management

Greet clients and create a welcoming, professional office environment
Manage phones, mail, scanning, filing, and document organization
Send client thank-you cards, birthday cards, and holiday correspondence
Assist with client events and appreciation activities

Compliance & Systems Support

Maintain organized client files for compliance reviews
Ensure proper documentation is stored in CRM and vault
Assist with software updates and basic technology coordination




What Success Looks Like

Advisors never chase paperwork
Clients feel cared for, organized, and responded to quickly
Transfers and account openings move efficiently with minimal errors
CRM is clean, powerful, and reliable
The office feels polished, warm, and professional
The firm can grow without operational chaos




Who You Are

Highly organized and detail-oriented
Excellent communicator with a professional presence
Process-driven and comfortable with technology and CRM systems
Able to manage multiple priorities without supervision
Service-minded with a passion for creating great client experiences
Experience in financial services, banking, or professional services preferred (not required)




Why This Role Matters




This position is critical to the growth and professionalism of our firm. You will directly impact client satisfaction, operational efficiency, and the advisor team’s ability to serve families at the highest level.




Location: Hybrid (Quarterly in-person team meetings)




Position Type: Full-time




Compensation: Competitive salary based on experience




﻿If you are someone who thrives on organization, systems, and creating an exceptional experience for clients, we would love to meet you.

… more

title: Client Banking Specialist (Reconciliation)
posted:
6 hours ago
Within the past 24 hours
description:
Imagine360

Client Banking Specialist (Reconciliation) 

United States · 6 hours ago · 63 people clicked apply

Promoted by hirer · Responses managed off LinkedIn

Remote
Full-time
Apply
Save
Use AI to assess how you fit

Get AI-powered advice on this job and more exclusive features with Premium. Try Premium for $0

Show match details

Tailor my resume

Help me stand out

About the job

Imagine360 is seeking a Client Banking Specialist - Reconciliation to join the team!  This position is responsible for compiling, calculating, reconciling, and posting data for use in maintaining and producing financial reports for clients. This position also assists the Client Banking Supervisor in performing daily activities to support successful team outcomes.

Position Location: 100% remote

Responsibilities include but are not limited to:

 Complete bank reconciliations accurately and timely


Produce related summary and reports for clients
Compile information and verify accuracy
Update client ledgers
Verify, monitor, and resolve funding and banking items
Analyze bank statements



Research and reissue of lost/stolen checks 


Work with other Reconciliation team members to manage lost check requests
Document lost check requests and details on appropriate logs
Place Stop Payments via Online Banking
Contact clients via email for status of check
Reissue check in appropriate system
Send appropriate correspondence for lost check requests to members and providers
Work with other departments to ensure timely and accurate reissuance of lost checks



Customer Service


Act as a role model in demonstrating the core values in customer service delivery
Provide timely and thorough follow-up with internal and external customers
Appropriately escalate difficult issues up the chain of command



Quality Assurance


Perform review and/or audit of other employees' work to ensure quality and procedural measures are being met
Actively participate in Client Banking staff meetings and cross-departmental meetings, ensuring client financial standards are met
Serves on committees, work groups, and/or process improvement teams, as assigned, to assist in improving quality/customer satisfaction
Recognizes and alerts appropriate supervisors of trends within their scope of responsibility that fall outside of quality parameters
Performs self-quality monitoring to develop and execute plans to meet established goals
Provides ongoing feedback to help optimize quality performance
Develop new or improve current internal processes to improve quality
This job description in no way states or implies that these are the only duties to be performed by this employee. The employee will be required to follow any other instructions and to perform any other duties requested by his/her supervisor



Required Experience/Education:


High School Diploma or Equivalent required
Minimum of 2 years bookkeeping or reconciliation experience required
Minimum of 1 year banking operations experience required



Skills and Abilities:


Strong attention to detail
Proficient in the use of Microsoft products (Excel, Word, Outlook, Access, etc.)
Ability to meet deadlines and assist with urgent client requests



What can Imagine360 offer you?


Multiple Health plan options
Company paid employee premiums for disability and life insurance
Parental Leave Policy
20 days PTO to start / 10 Paid Holidays
Tuition reimbursement
401k Company contribution
Company paid Short & Long term Disability plus Life Insurance
Professional development initiatives / continuous learning opportunities
Opportunities to participate in and support the company's diversity and inclusion initiatives



Want to see our latest job opportunities? Follow us on  LinkedIn

Imagine360 is a health plan solution company that combines 50+ years of self-funding healthcare expertise. Over the years, we've helped thousands of employers save billions on healthcare. Our breakthrough total health plan solution is fixing today's one-size-fits-none PPO insurance problems with powerful, customized, member-focused solutions.

Imagine360 is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or veteran status.

**RECRUITMENT AGENCIES PLEASE NOTE: Imagine360 will only accept applications from agencies/business partners that have been invited to work on a specific role. Candidate Resumes/CV's submitted without permission or directly to Hiring Managers will be considered unsolicited and no fee will be payable. Thank you for your cooperation**

About the company

Imagine360

17,395 followers

Insurance

1001-5000 employees

Imagine360 is an integrated health plan addressing one of the greatest challenges on behalf of self-funded employers: healthcare costs are harming the bottom line, they're increasingly unaffordable for employees, and the experience remains poor. We help businesses and their employees navigate through clutter and chaos and bring deep cost savings that protect everyone’s well-being and budgets. It’s way more than a health plan. It’s a promise. 

We’ve helped hundreds of self-funded clients. Our solutions are ready to be implemented. The results are proven and impactful. 

Imagine360’s innovative payment model includes preferential contracting with providers and health systems, and additional price protection through reference-based pricing, saving employers 15-30% on average compared to the national carriers. 

With more than 17 years’ experience, and 25-million-months of member data, Imagine360 offers care coordination and medical management to proactively guide members through the complexities of healthcare. We bring employers a reimagined health plan solution, created to provide the flexibility, service and support employers need to take good care of employees, their families and business. We do this through: 

- Assistance with plan design and expert administration with integrated third-party administration 

- Built-in price protection from the #1 reference-based pricing solution in healthcare 

- Provider contracts with Imagine Health’s top-rated providers and health systems 

- Comprehensive member support throughout their healthcare journey 

It’s more than a health plan. It’s our promise to deliver a better health plan experience. 

Learn more at https://www.imagine360 today!
